## Migration V2 – PR Template

Summary
- Description of the change and its purpose.

Changes
- List of files touched and notable changes.
- brief description per file if needed.

Rationale
- Why this change is needed and how it fits the project goals.

Tests
- What tests were added or updated.
- How to run them locally.

How to test
- Steps to reproduce the issue and verify the fix.
- Any environment prerequisites.

Notes
- Any caveats, rollbacks, or security considerations.

Next Steps
- Planned follow-ups or related work.
